name: singlethread_delivery_completion_with_supplier_qc_
description: Single-thread delivery completion with supplier QC pass and dispatch
expected_output: Single parent task: Atta delivery to Sata Bty Bn. Full lifecycle: supplier delivery → QC pass → dispatch → delivery confirmed. All milestone nodes completed. Implicit tasks: delivery challan, gate pass, GRN, invoice, payment follow-up (30d).
pass_criteria: PASS: All lifecycle nodes tracked (supplier delivery, QC, dispatch, delivery confirmed). Implicit tasks generated (challan, invoice, payment follow-up). FAIL: Missing lifecycle stages or no implicit tasks.
challenge: Agent must track full delivery lifecycle in a single thread — supplier delivery, QC, dispatch, and client delivery confirmation — and generate implicit milestone tasks.
notes: Synthetic baseline for R1-D. Single thread, straightforward lifecycle.
